description: Top-100 shortlist per publication cohort, scored under V2.5-diff (p_therapeutic_selectivity), annotated with nearest gene, feature class, and CpG-island context. Source pipeline: scripts/annotate_top_hits.py at top-K=100. RepeatMasker and DNase clusters intentionally omitted from the slim schema; the per-cohort TSV/MD under examples/<cohort>_roth_labels/ has the full 30+ column form.
